title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
friendlyTitle: SkillSpector: a security scanner for AI agent skills
summary: SkillSpector is NVIDIA’s security scanner for AI-agent skills, checking repositories, URLs, ZIPs, directories, and SKILL.md files for vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and supply-chain risks. It covers categories including prompt injection, data exfiltration, privilege escalation, dangerous code, and MCP tool poisoning.
friendlySummary: NVIDIA’s SkillSpector checks AI agent skills for security problems before they are installed. It looks for issues such as prompt injection, data leaks, dangerous scripts, and risky MCP tools.
whyItMatters: Agent users and platform builders can run it before installing third-party skills, or integrate its JSON and SARIF outputs into review and CI workflows for safer agent ecosystems.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This is useful for anyone installing third-party agent skills. It gives teams a way to review agent extensions before trusting them with files and tools.
